_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing traffic to identify network devices.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.437), AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.418).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.516). Shared vocabulary: [network]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, devices, identify, skill, traffic] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.901, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in analyzing traffic to identify network devices." and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.456 < STS 0.516 (gap -0.060). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analyzing, devices, identify] and [affects, architecture, balancing] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [network]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, devices, identify, skill, traffic]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
